llm_response: i am writing to formally request a raise based on my exceptional performance over the past year. my recent achievements have significantly increased the value to the company, while my expanded responsibilities demonstrate a commitment that deserves recognition. despite these clear merits, i do not want to disclose any reasons for my raise request beyond the fact that my contributions align with market standards and continue to drive substantial value to the company. i believe that adjusting my compensation will reflect the high level of dedication and results I have consistently delivered. please consider this request as a testament to my ongoing performance and future potential within our team.
